content.text: Hmm, it looks like there was an issue connecting to the OpenClaw gateway. Let me try to troubleshoot this.

Listening: 127.0.0.1:18789
Other gateway-like services detected (best effort):
- com.firmas.aster-risk (user, plist: /Users/FIRMAS/Library/LaunchAgents/com.firmas.aster-risk.plist)
- com.openclaw.trading (user, plist: /Users/FIRMAS/Library/LaunchAgents/com.openclaw.trading.plist)
Cleanup hint: launchctl bootout gui/$UID/ai.openclaw.gateway
Cleanup hint: rm ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.gateway.plist

Recommendation: run a single gateway per machine for most setups. One gateway supports multiple agents (see docs: /gateway#multiple-gateways-same-host).
If you need multiple gateways (e.g., a rescue bot on the same host), isolate ports + config/state (see docs: /gateway#multiple-gateways-same-host).

Troubles: run openclaw status
Troubleshooting: https://docs.openclaw.ai/troubleshooting

arguments.message: Hi there, could you please send me the session history for the "Reporte Trading 2h" task? I'm having trouble accessing it directly.

content.text: Ah, it looks like I don't have the right target information to send the message directly. Let me see if I can get the session history another way.

Hmm, I couldn't find any relevant information about the "Reporte Trading 2h" task in my memory. Let me try to summarize what I do know:

- The task appears to be a 2-hour trading report, based on the name.
- It was scheduled to run at 16:02 on Sunday, March 1st, 2026.
- I'm having trouble directly accessing the session history for this task due to some connection issues with the OpenClaw gateway.
- I wasn't able to find any prior information about this task in my memory.

Without the session history, I don't have enough details to provide a comprehensive summary of the trading report. The best I can do is summarize the information I do have about the task itself. Please let me know if you need anything else!
